description_long: This jet ski features a streamlined, metallic body with a sleek, elongated profile and a slightly raised front section. The exterior is predominantly silver with several red circular accents and subtle engraved lines along the sides, giving it a modern, high-performance appearance. The central section houses a black, angular control console with visible handlebars and two small, gold-colored components that appear to be part of the control or ignition system. The rear section tapers smoothly, while the front is slightly upturned, suggesting hydrodynamic efficiency. The surface finish is glossy and reflective, with hard, smooth contours throughout. No visible branding or registration markings are present, and the seat area is integrated into the main body, appearing to accommodate a single rider.
description: A sleek, metallic silver jet ski with red accents, a black control console, and a streamlined, glossy body designed for single-rider use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated silver body, red accents, and the black control console with two gold components visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, upturned nose, the black handlebar assembly, and the central control area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined silver body, red accents, and the black console from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tapered back, the integrated seat area, and the black control console from behind.
attribute_handlebar_design: Black, angular handlebar with two upright grips and a central mounting, possibly with integrated controls.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, integrated seat area contoured into the main body, with no visible padding or separate sections, finished in metallic silver.
